_doc: Operator config for docs/BUILD-LOOP.md. Authored 2026-05-08; revised to all-AWS architecture (ECS Fargate + EFS + Supabase Realtime — no Fly, no Upstash). Stage policy revised 2026-05-08: production has no real users yet, so every AWS deploy targets `--stage production`; the stg AWS stage is dropped. Supabase staging branches and Doppler stg/prd configs are independent and unchanged. Values marked null are discovered at runtime by the loop (see _discovery).
_modeNote: autonomous = loop auto-grants every approval gate EXCEPT the catastrophic-operations list in BUILD-LOOP.md §4.0. Switch to 'supervised' to require explicit chat approval on every gated step.
_awsStageNote: All `sst deploy` and `aws` mutations in this build-loop target this stage. Single-stage policy because production currently has no users.
_dopplerNote: Doppler `stg`/`prd` configs are independent of AWS stage. Loop reads from `prd` for production AWS deploys.
_supabaseProjectNote: Resolved 2026-05-08 — only one active Supabase project (`Basics`, xihupmgkamnfbzacksja, us-east-2). Both staging and prod refs point at it. The older `bascisos` project (fjkvpgqrdhsmzfginhnc) lacks a public.workspaces table and is dormant.

subdomains._appNote: web/ is retired; the desktop app lives in a separate repo and consumes this api endpoint + the SSE/Realtime surface.

_designPartnerNote: Pulled from api/staging-smoke.mjs:15 (the existing test workspace). Phase F.1 was originally a per-workspace flag flip from a v1 legacy path to v2; with no real users, F.1 reduces to setting v2 as default and confirming the test workspace runs cleanly.
_activeTaskTrackingNote: workspace_active_tasks is a Postgres table (single source of truth — same DB as everything else). Lambdas read/write it via Supavisor pooler (DATABASE_URL_POOLER in Doppler). No DynamoDB.

events._note: Event distribution uses Supabase Realtime via the run_events table. No external Redis/Upstash. SSE proxy on api Lambda subscribes via Supabase Realtime client.

browserbase._note: Credentials in Doppler (BROWSERBASE_API_KEY, BROWSERBASE_PROJECT_ID). Project assumed to be the existing one used by api/.

budget._note: Cap on cumulative cloud spend kicked off by the build (Fargate task-seconds, Browserbase verification sessions, EFS storage, AWS resources). Does NOT limit Claude Code token spend in this session — that's billed to the user's Claude Code account/subscription separately.

soak._note: BUILD-LOOP.md §6 Phase F.2 — 7-day passive observation before deleting legacy code. Loop self-pauses until soak ends, then resumes.

killSwitch._note: Set any of these to true to halt the loop next iteration. Wins over `mode`.

_discovery.stagingSupabaseProjectRef: On first need, MCP `mcp__supabase__list_projects`, find the project whose name contains 'stg' or 'staging'. If exactly one match, use it. If none, create one via MCP `create_project` (this is gated). If multiple, halt.
_discovery.prodSupabaseProjectRef: Same as staging but match 'prod' or 'production'. Read-only on prod by default (see §4.0 catastrophic list).
